application_description.message: Open source project aimed at helping amateur chemistry hobbyists find the best deals on chemical reagents. There are plenty of similar services out there for businesses, universities and research institutions, but none are available for individuals and hobbyists. ChemPal only searches suppliers that sell to individuals and ship to residences. hobbyists. ChemPal only searches suppliers that sell to individuals and ship to residences.

about_chempal.description: The title of the about ChemPal section.

contributors.description: The title of the contributors section.

cancel_search.description: The text of the button to cancel the search.

aborting_search.description: The text of the status shown when aborting a search.

loading_search.description: The text of the status shown when loading a search.

chempal_favorites_folder_name.description: The name of the ChemPal favorites folder.

chemical_product.description: The name of the chemical product.

this_product_cant_be_removed_from_the_ca.message: This product can't be removed from the cache
this_product_cant_be_removed_from_the_ca.description: The message shown when a product can't be removed from the cache.

context_menu_copy_title.description: The text of the context menu option to copy the title.

context_menu_copy_url.description: The text of the context menu option to copy the URL.

context_menu_copy_product_info.description: The text of the context menu option to copy the product info.

context_menu_ignore_product.description: The text of the context menu option to ignore the product.

context_menu_remove_product_from_cache.description: The text of the context menu option to remove the product from the cache.

context_menu_open_in_new_tab.description: The text of the context menu option to open the product in a new tab.

context_menu_create_bookmark.description: The text of the context menu option to create a bookmark.

context_menu_search_similar.description: The text of the context menu option to search for similar products.

context_menu_share.description: The text of the context menu option to share the product.

context_menu_view_details.description: The text of the context menu option to view the details of the product.

context_not_available.description: The message shown when the context is not available.

supplier_selection.description: The text of the supplier selection component.

column_visibility.description: The text of the column visibility component.

filter_results_table_placeholder.description: The placeholder text for the filter results table input.

results_table_status_searching.description: The text of the status shown when searching.

results_table_status_no_search_query.description: The text of the status shown when there is no search query.

results_table_status_no_results_matching.message: No results matching your filter values
results_table_status_no_results_matching.description: The text of the status shown when there are no results matching the filter values.

results_table_status_no_results_found.description: The text of the status shown when there are no results found.

results_table_retry.description: The text of the button to retry the search.
